titleStmt.title: SII 41.147: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 147. (A.R. No. 146 of 1905.) Veñjamāṅgūḍalūr, Karur Taluk, Tiruchirāppaḷḷi District. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Vikritisvara temple at Veñjamāṅgūḍalūr.

summary.p: Gift of some tax-free land in Nāgamalai in Veṅgāla-nāḍu by the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
konerimai koṇṭān Āḷuṭaiyartiru
veñcamā kūṭa nāyanār vikitakku veṅkā
lai nāṭṭu nākamalaip paḷḷiyil nirnilam Udaka
m paṇṇi kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu talaippulattu
Eṭṭām poyil kiḻ mekkaṭaiya nilam nālumā
vum Atin kiḻakku nāṉmāvaraiyum vaḻi Iṭam po
kku poyil kiḻ Araiye Iraṇṭumāvum Atin
kiḻakkumulaittiruveli poyil kiḻkāle Irumā
vum vaḻiyil tiruveli mekkaṭaiya nilam kāle O
rumāvum Atiṉ kiḻakku Añcaveli poyil kiḻ Ū
ñcaveli nilam mukkāle muṉṟumāvum kaiveli po
yil kiḻ kaivelinilam kāle Orumāvum Aḻukalp pera
yilkiḻ nilam Araikkālum talaikkāppoyil kiḻ ni
lam muṉṟumāvum Aracikuḷattu poyil kiḻmekkaṭai
ya nilam patinmuṉṟumāvum kuḷavelipoyil kiḻ nila
m veliyum Iṟaiyā neṭuveli muṉṟām poyil kiḻ
nilam kāle Orumāvum Āka nilam Ayiveliyāl
nel vitai Aṟupatiṅkalamum Itil Aṅku I
rukkum tapaciyarkku nilam Innilattil veliyāl
nilam pannirukalamum nikki niṉṟa nilam Amutupaṭikkum
pūcaikku viñcanaṅkaḷukkum viṭṭōm In nilam kuṭi
nikki cennirveṭṭi ceyātākavum Annir munnir pāc
ci koḷvatākavum nilattāl vanta Iṟai puravu Elavai
ukavai maṟṟu Eppeṟ paṭṭatum kaṟṟu pulapokā muṟṟūṭṭu
m koḷvatākavum nammolai kuṭuttu Eḻuttu Iṭ
ṭu kuṭuttom cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka nantamar pāṭut
tu koḷka Itu māṟṟuvān vaḻi Eḻaccamum Aṟuvān
pan(m)māheśvara rakṣai Ivai vilāṭattaraiyan
Eḻuttu yivai kāṭuveṭṭikaḷ Eḻuttu Aṟamaṟaveṟkka A
ṟamallatu tuṇaiye .
Digital edition of SII 41.147 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
